files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [ main ]
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [ main ]
+
+jobs:
+  build:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: '20'
+          cache: 'pnpm'
+      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v2
+        with:
+          version: 10
+      - run: pnpm install
+      - run: pnpm run lint
+      - run: pnpm run test
+      - run: pnpm run build

@@ -7,7 +7,8 @@
     "emitDeclarationOnly": false,
     "sourceMap": false,
     "allowJs": false,
-    "removeComments": false
+    "removeComments": false,
+    "allowImportingTsExtensions": false
   },
   "include": ["bin/**/*.ts", "scripts/**/*.ts", "src/**/*.ts"],
   "exclude": ["tests", "dist", "node_modules", ".bun-check"]
